verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A million miles between earth and God's blue heaven Sometimes we think that God is that far We think the stormy clouds hides the rising sun God is not far, it's just a prayer away

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The distance between the problem is the solution It's the distance between the knees and the floor The shortcut the reach God in his throne of mercy To walk up with him, bended our knees The distance between the problem is the solution It's the distance between the knees and the floor

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We think go wrong it's no seem nobody cares Sometimes we think, God is ignoring us The answer to prayer seems to be outreach He never fail if you call on his name
